texto: I'd like to be a truck driver. I think you could run your life that way. It wouldn't be such a bad way of doing it. It would offer a chance to be alone.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Princess Anne of England: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I'd like to be a truck driver. I think you could run your life that way. It wouldn't be such a ba…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, side, truck pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
